hints: source.go defines SourceMessage type — the common data model for all sources
registry.go has Registry struct (6 functions) — source registration and lookup
Four implementations in sub-packages: hackernews/hn.go (HNSource), reddit/reddit.go (RedditSource), rss/rss.go (RSSSource), telegram/telegram.go (TelegramSource)
source/telegram depends on refresh/telegram.go (fetcher interface) — watch for this bridge
hackernews and rss directly call storage types — may bypass the Source abstraction for sync state
